title: Global limits of hydrological state monitoring for high-flow prediction
description: Derived source data and lightweight code supporting the article 'Global limits of hydrological state monitoring for high-flow prediction'. The release contains public-safe figure source data, supporting derived audit tables and figure-building scripts. Raw provider data are not redistributed.

creators.name: Zhou, Xi-Yin
